signals.content_en: MOFCOM: Preliminary affirmative determination in anti-dumping investigation on certain analog integrated circuits originating in the United States MOFCOM announced a preliminary affirmative determination in an anti-dumping investigation covering interface ICs and gate driver ICs under HS headings 8542 and 8541. Exporters should review country-specific duties when shipping to China.
signals.content_zh: MOFCOM: Preliminary affirmative determination in anti-dumping investigation on certain analog integrated circuits originating in the United States MOFCOM announced a preliminary affirmative determination in an anti-dumping investigation covering interface ICs and gate driver ICs under HS headings 8542 and 8541. Exporters should review country-specific duties when shipping to China.

signals.content_en: Provincial commerce department trade remedy alert: EU carbon border adjustment may affect steel-aluminum embodied exports A provincial fair-trade bureau issued an early warning on EU CBAM reporting obligations for electronics enclosures and heat sinks containing aluminum content above threshold levels.
signals.content_zh: Provincial commerce department trade remedy alert: EU carbon border adjustment may affect steel-aluminum embodied exports A provincial fair-trade bureau issued an early warning on EU CBAM reporting obligations for electronics enclosures and heat sinks containing aluminum content above threshold levels.

signals.content_en: Commerce adds entities to the Entity List for advanced computing and semiconductor manufacturing support BIS published a rule adding entities to the Entity List related to advanced computing items, semiconductor manufacturing equipment, and associated technology transfers.
signals.content_zh: Commerce adds entities to the Entity List for advanced computing and semiconductor manufacturing support BIS published a rule adding entities to the Entity List related to advanced computing items, semiconductor manufacturing equipment, and associated technology transfers.

signals.content_en: BIS issues interim final rule on foreign-produced direct product controls for high-performance AI chips The rule expands licensing requirements for exports and reexports of advanced computing integrated circuits and certain foreign-produced direct products.
signals.content_zh: BIS issues interim final rule on foreign-produced direct product controls for high-performance AI chips The rule expands licensing requirements for exports and reexports of advanced computing integrated circuits and certain foreign-produced direct products.
